Jesus, "as a hen" to the "descendants of Jacob" (3 Ne. 10:4), offers them nourishment and protection from predators. To the Nephites the Lord recited the same lamentation which he had spoken to the Jews (Matt. 23:37): "How oft have I gathered you as a hen gathereth her chickens under her wings, and have nourished you .... and ye would not."
